meaning: n.<美>诺梅克斯(一种轻质耐高温芳香族聚酰胺,可用以制宇航服或消防服)
examples: MCPS - Multi-Climate Protection System - NOMEX flame resistant clothing for US Marine and Navy aviators and aircrew.
Dupont NOMEX paper is used as base of SG (b) 10 insulating system, it keeps excellent electrical and mechanical performance during service lifetime of transformer.
The NOMEX material at high temperature and high temperature of cotton cloth, durable, beautiful, air permeability, water absorption, good elasticity, ensure the ironing quality.
And for a carbon-Nomex, alien-tech confection, it's a delight to find that it runs on SU carburettors.
Relatively little of that goes to the Nomex-clad fire-fighters shown battling heroically on the evening news.
